title: schistogyne multiflora
intro: Schistogyne multiflora, also known as the 'thorny groundsel', is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its thorny stems and yellow daisy-like flowers. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Schistogyne multiflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
